Soren Hartwhistle is the founder of Kelpforge. Soren is exploring a pivot toward the enterprise segment.

---
title: Kelpforge
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Soren Hartwhistle.
---

Kelpforge is a seed-stage company. Founded by Soren Hartwhistle. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Kelpforge call with Soren Hartwhistle.
Soren is worried the Kelpforge pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
I committed to sending Soren the diligence checklist by Friday.
Soren prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
